{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "AHM Resource Hub - an&nbsp;HR Management &amp; Consulting is&nbsp;recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Karsana, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a talented Social Media Manager to help our client expand their digital footprint, oversee their social media communications efforts and increase brand awareness and affinity.
	The ideal candidate will manage the company&#39;s image in a cohesive way to achieve their marketing and branding goals. The candidate should be well-versed in the latest digital technologies and social media trends. The candidate should also have in-depth knowledge of SEO, analytics, and content management tools.
	Ultimately, you should be able to handle our social media presence ensuring high levels of web traffic, engagement and delivering both useful and appealing online information about our company and products.


Responsibilities


	Design and implement social media strategy to align with business goals.
	Generate, edit, publish and share engaging creative content daily (e.g. original text, photos, videos and news) for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X.
	Monitor SEO and web traffic metrics.
	Collaborate with other teams, like marketing, sales and customer service to ensure brand consistency.
	Communicate with followers, respond to queries in a timely manner and monitor customer reviews.
	Oversee social media accounts&rsquo; design.
	Suggest and implement new features to develop brand awareness.
	Stay up-to-date with current technologies and trends in social media, design tools and applications.
	Update content across various social media channels.
	Utilize social media marketing.
	Design and implement social media strategy that aligns with our business goals.
	Set targets to increase brand awareness and increase customer engagement and loyalty.
	Manage and track budgets for social media activities.
	Research on industry-related topics.
	Become an extension of the company&rsquo;s brand to connect with existing customers, and acquire new ones.
	Coordinate with marketing and design teams to illustrate articles.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in English, Communication, Marketing or relevant field.
	At least 3 years of proven work experience as a Social Media Manager.
	Excellent copywriting and editing skills.
	Ability to deliver creative content (text, image and video).
	Solid knowledge of SEO, keyword research, Meta and Google Analytics.
	Knowledge of online marketing channels.
	Experience with paid social media advertising.


Other Requirements:


	Clear, confident communication abilities.
	Effective time-management skills.
	Significant experience leading a brand&rsquo;s social media initiatives.
	Keen understanding of how to craft effective social media strategies
	Large social media following
	Analytical and multitasking skills
	Understanding of target audience &amp; brand voice
	Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams.


Salary
N200,000 / month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV &amp; Portfolio to:&nbsp;ahmresourcehub@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-16",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "AHM Resource Hub"
    
  },

Social Media Manager Job at AHM Resource Hub




        
    

        
        AHM Resource Hub - an HR Management & Consulting is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager
Job Location: Karsana, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a talented Social Media Manager to help our client expand their digital footprint, oversee their social media communications efforts and increase brand awareness and affinity.
	The ideal candidate will manage the company's image in a cohesive way to achieve their marketing and branding goals. The candidate should be well-versed in the latest digital technologies and social media trends. The candidate should also have in-depth knowledge of SEO, analytics, and content management tools.
	Ultimately, you should be able to handle our social media presence ensuring high levels of web traffic, engagement and delivering both useful and appealing online information about our company and products.


Responsibilities


	Design and implement social media strategy to align with business goals.
	Generate, edit, publish and share engaging creative content daily (e.g. original text, photos, videos and news) for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X.
	Monitor SEO and web traffic metrics.
	Collaborate with other teams, like marketing, sales and customer service to ensure brand consistency.
	Communicate with followers, respond to queries in a timely manner and monitor customer reviews.
	Oversee social media accounts’ design.
	Suggest and implement new features to develop brand awareness.
	Stay up-to-date with current technologies and trends in social media, design tools and applications.
	Update content across various social media channels.
	Utilize social media marketing.
	Design and implement social media strategy that aligns with our business goals.
	Set targets to increase brand awareness and increase customer engagement and loyalty.
	Manage and track budgets for social media activities.
	Research on industry-related topics.
	Become an extension of the company’s brand to connect with existing customers, and acquire new ones.
	Coordinate with marketing and design teams to illustrate articles.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in English, Communication, Marketing or relevant field.
	At least 3 years of proven work experience as a Social Media Manager.
	Excellent copywriting and editing skills.
	Ability to deliver creative content (text, image and video).
	Solid knowledge of SEO, keyword research, Meta and Google Analytics.
	Knowledge of online marketing channels.
	Experience with paid social media advertising.


Other Requirements:


	Clear, confident communication abilities.
	Effective time-management skills.
	Significant experience leading a brand’s social media initiatives.
	Keen understanding of how to craft effective social media strategies
	Large social media following
	Analytical and multitasking skills
	Understanding of target audience & brand voice
	Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams.


Salary
N200,000 / month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV & Portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Customer care Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Keilewo-Ibara Axis, Abeokuta / Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Address and resolve customer inquiries and complaints via phone, email, and chat
	Process orders, forms, applications, and requests
	Follow up with customers to ensure their issues are fully resolved
	Maintain customer records and update account information as needed
	Work closely with other departments to resolve complex customer issues
	Provide feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process
	Meet or exceed performance metrics related to customer service.


Qualifications


	High School Diploma or equivalent; Bachelor&#39;s Degree preferred
	Proven customer service experience
	Strong problem-solving skills
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Ability to handle stressful situations with professionalism
	Attention to detail and accuracy in data entry
	Familiarity with customer service software and tools.


Skills:


	Communication
	Problem-solving
	Customer service software (e.g., Zendesk, Salesforce)
	Time management
	Data entry
	Multitasking
	Conflict resolution


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to:&nbsp;adisayetunde@outlook.com&nbsp;using &quot;CSR - Abeokuta&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Customer care Representative Job at TalentNova HR




        
    

        
        TalentNova HR, into Talent Sourcing, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer care Representative

Job Location: Keilewo-Ibara Axis, Abeokuta / Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Address and resolve customer inquiries and complaints via phone, email, and chat
	Process orders, forms, applications, and requests
	Follow up with customers to ensure their issues are fully resolved
	Maintain customer records and update account information as needed
	Work closely with other departments to resolve complex customer issues
	Provide feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process
	Meet or exceed performance metrics related to customer service.


Qualifications


	High School Diploma or equivalent; Bachelor's Degree preferred
	Proven customer service experience
	Strong problem-solving skills
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Ability to handle stressful situations with professionalism
	Attention to detail and accuracy in data entry
	Familiarity with customer service software and tools.


Skills:


	Communication
	Problem-solving
	Customer service software (e.g., Zendesk, Salesforce)
	Time management
	Data entry
	Multitasking
	Conflict resolution


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using "CSR - Abeokuta" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
